fields.name: Args
fields.doc: Args is the command-line arguments passed to the launcher, for example ["--headless", "--no-sandbox"].

fields.name: Env
fields.doc: Env is a list of environment variables in the format KEY=VALUE, for example ["PATH=/usr/bin", "DEBUG=1"].

fields.name: Id
fields.doc: Id is the unique identifier of the GUI application.

fields.name: LaunchUri
fields.doc:
LaunchUri is the URI used to open the GUI window, for example weixin://launchapplet?appid=xxxx.
If provided, the application will be launched and this URI will be opened.

fields.name: Launcher
fields.doc: Launcher is the launcher command or executable path, for example C:\Program Files\App\app.exe or /usr/bin/app.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the GUI application name.

fields.name: Process
fields.doc: Process is the process name associated with the GUI window, used for window detection and management.

fields.name: Timeout
fields.doc:
Timeout is the timeout in milliseconds for launching the application.
If 0, no timeout limit is applied.

fields.name: WaitTime
fields.doc:
WaitTime is the wait time in milliseconds after launching the application before returning.
Useful for allowing the GUI to fully initialize.

fields.name: WindowHeight
fields.doc: WindowHeight is the preferred window height in pixels. If 0, uses default.

fields.name: WindowWidth
fields.doc: WindowWidth is the preferred window width in pixels. If 0, uses default.

fields.name: WorkDir
fields.doc:
WorkDir is the working directory for the launched application.
If empty, defaults to the directory of the launcher executable.

symbols.name: MobileApplication
symbols.doc: MobileApplication defines mobile application configuration for Android/iOS devices.

fields.name: Action
fields.doc:
Action is the Intent action, for example android.intent.action.MAIN or android.intent.action.VIEW.
If empty, defaults to android.intent.action.MAIN.

fields.name: Activity
fields.doc:
Activity is the Activity class name to launch, for example .MainActivity.
Used with Package to form the component for adb command: adb shell am start -n package/activity.

fields.name: Extras
fields.doc:
Extras is a JSON object containing Intent extras (key-value pairs).
For example: {"key1": "value1", "key2": "value2"}.

fields.name: Flags
fields.doc:
Flags is the Intent flags as a comma-separated list, for example "FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK,FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP".
These are passed to adb with --flags parameter.

fields.name: Id
fields.doc: Id is the unique identifier of the mobile application.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the mobile application name.

fields.name: Package
fields.doc: Package is the application package name, for example com.example.app.

fields.name: Timeout
fields.doc:
Timeout is the timeout in milliseconds for starting the application.
If 0, no timeout limit is applied.

fields.name: WaitTime
fields.doc:
WaitTime is the wait time in milliseconds after launching the application before returning.
Useful for allowing the app to fully initialize.

fields.name: Author
fields.doc: Author is the script author.

fields.name: Description
fields.doc: Description describes script functionality and usage.

fields.name: Devices
fields.doc: Devices is the list of applicable devices, for example ["windows", "mac", "ubuntu"].

fields.name: Email
fields.doc: Email is the contact email address.

fields.name: EngineVersion
fields.doc: EngineVersion is the required engine version.

fields.name: License
fields.doc: License is the license, based on the LICENSE file or declaration.

fields.name: Package
fields.doc: Package is the script package name. Only scripts under this package can be imported and called.

fields.name: Specifier
fields.doc:
Specifier is the module identifier, including domain, owner, name, and version,
parsed from the go.mod file.

fields.name: Tags
fields.doc: Tags is a list of script topic tags, for example ["web automation", "data extraction"].

fields.name: UpdateTime
fields.doc: UpdateTime is the last update time (last commit time), formatted as RFC3339.

fields.name: Website
fields.doc: Website is the official website of the script.

fields.name: Abstract
fields.doc: Abstract is the variable description.

fields.name: Default
fields.doc: Default is the default value of the variable.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the variable name.

fields.name: Required
fields.doc: Required indicates whether the variable is required.

fields.name: Save
fields.doc: Save indicates whether to save the variable to project storage.

fields.name: Type
fields.doc: Type is the variable type, such as string, integer, boolean, or json.

fields.name: Domain
fields.doc: Domain is the source domain of the module, such as github.com.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the module name, such as utils.

fields.name: Owner
fields.doc: Owner is the module owner, such as a GitHub username.

fields.name: Version
fields.doc: Version is the required module version, such as v1.2.3.

fields.name: Abstract
fields.doc: Abstract is the permission description.

fields.name: Permission
fields.doc: Permission is the access permission, such as r, w, d, rw, or rwd.

fields.name: Url
fields.doc: Url is the URL pattern, supporting wildcard (*) and script variable ${var_name}.

symbols.name: VariableDataType
symbols.doc: VariableDataType defines data types for script variables.

fields.name: Args
fields.doc: Args is a list of additional browser command-line arguments, for example ["--proxy-server=localhost:8080", "--disable-plugins"].

fields.name: BrowserType
fields.doc:
BrowserType is the browser type to use, for example "chrome", "firefox", "edge", "safari".
If empty, defaults to system default browser.

fields.name: Id
fields.doc: Id is the unique identifier of the browser application.

fields.name: Incognito
fields.doc: Incognito indicates whether to open the browser in private/incognito mode.

fields.name: LoadTimeout
fields.doc:
LoadTimeout is the timeout in milliseconds for page loading.
If 0, no timeout limit is applied.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the browser application name.

fields.name: Url
fields.doc: Url is the browser application URL to open, for example https://www.google.com.

fields.name: UserDataDir
fields.doc:
UserDataDir is the custom user data directory for the browser profile.
If empty, uses the default profile directory.

fields.name: WaitTime
fields.doc:
WaitTime is the wait time in milliseconds after opening the URL before returning.
Useful for allowing the page to fully load.

fields.name: WindowHeight
fields.doc: WindowHeight is the preferred window height in pixels. If 0, uses default.

fields.name: WindowWidth
fields.doc: WindowWidth is the preferred window width in pixels. If 0, uses default.

symbols.name: YScript
symbols.doc: YScript defines the top-level script configuration structure.

fields.name: ApiPermissions
fields.doc: ApiPermissions is the list of network API permissions.

fields.name: FilePermissions
fields.doc: FilePermissions is the list of filesystem permissions.

fields.name: GuiApps
fields.doc: GuiApps is the list of GUI applications to operate.

fields.name: MobileApps
fields.doc: MobileApps is the list of mobile applications to operate.

fields.name: Module
fields.doc: Module is the basic script module information.

fields.name: ScriptDependencies
fields.doc: ScriptDependencies is the list of script module specifiers imported by this script project.

fields.name: Variables
fields.doc: Variables is the list of global script variable definitions.

fields.name: WebApps
fields.doc: WebApps is the list of web applications to operate.

fields.name: WorkerDependencies
fields.doc: WorkerDependencies is the list of IPC service dependencies.
